# Allow all major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /

# Allow AI answer engines (AEO/AIO/GEO)
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

# Block scrapers and bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

# Block all from private/source paths
User-agent: *
Disallow: /src/
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /scratch/
Disallow: /scripts/
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://www.buzziwah.com/sitemap.xml
